facebook.caption:
4.6 stars. 1,040 reviews. On Đường Trần Hưng Đạo, steps from the water.

La Veranda Resort Phu Quoc - MGallery Collection gives you kayaks at sunrise, yoga on the beach, Mediterranean food, and a full spa. Colonial-style property that actually earns every review.

This is the move if you want Phu Quoc without the chaos. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Kayak out at 7am. Spa by noon. Mediterranean dinner as the sun drops. La Veranda Resort Phu Quoc - MGallery Collection is doing everything right on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. 4.6 stars from 1,040 guests says it all.
